items.title: huashu-design
items.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
items.summary: Huashu Design is an HTML-native skill for Claude Code, offering high-fidelity prototypes, slides, animations, and exports to MP4 and PPTX. It includes 20 design philosophies and 5-dimensional expert reviews. Agent-agnostic, it simplifies design processes.

items.title: garden-skills
items.description: ConardLi's open-source Skills collection, featuring web design, knowledge retrieval, image generation, and more.
items.summary: The Garden skill automates maintenance for Personal Knowledge Management systems. It enhances efficiency in managing complex information. It's part of ConardLi's open-source Skills collection.

items.title: mercury-agent
items.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
items.summary: Mercury Agent is a 24/7 soul-driven AI with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access via CLI and Telegram. It operates autonomously while maintaining strict control.

items.title: OpenGame
items.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
items.summary: OpenGame is an open-source framework for creating web games from text. It addresses LLM incoherence and includes an evaluation pipeline for interactive playability. It's designed for end-to-end game development.

items.title: chatgpt2api
items.summary: There is no official ChatGPT API. The model is built by a team of inventors at Amazon. Use the available Openai API for similar capabilities.

items.title: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.
items.summary: Harmonist is a portable AI agent orchestration tool with no runtime dependencies, managing 186 agents through mechanical protocol enforcement. It uses a SQLite mail system for coordination and enforces runtime security.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: The cc-design skill enables high-fidelity HTML design and prototype creation. It supports visual artifacts like landing pages and UI mockups. This skill is part of the Claude Code project.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: AGENTS.md transforms coding agents to act like senior engineers, eliminating sycophancy and ensuring rigorous verification. It integrates Karpathy's principles and Boris Cherny's workflow, compatible with various tools. Essential for high-quality code generation.

items.title: text-to-cad
items.description: An open source harness for generating CAD models
items.summary: Text-to-CAD is an open-source tool for generating parametric CAD models from text using Python. It supports exporting to STEP, STL, DXF, and GLB formats. It is MIT-licensed and available on GitHub.

items.title: gpt_image_2_skill
items.description: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery, image prompt library, agentic skill, and CLI for OpenAI image generation/editing
items.summary: GPT Image 2 is an advanced tool for generating high-quality images. It includes a CLI for easy integration and supports various creative applications. It's designed for both professional and experimental use.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: An AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon offers a proxy for accessing free-tier LLMs from multiple providers with automatic failover. Use it for personal experimentation only.

items.title: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.
items.summary: Future AGI is an open-source platform for evaluating, observing, and improving AI applications. It includes tools for simulation, evaluation, and protection. It is self-hostable under an Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: agent-sprite-forge
items.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets and map, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.
items.summary: Agent-Sprite-Forge generates 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from text prompts. It's a skill developed by 0x0funky. It's available on GitHub.

items.title: Cairn
items.description: AI 自动化通用问题解决 / AI 自动化渗透测试系统
items.summary: Cairn is an AI-driven tool for automated penetration testing developed by the oritera team. It uses AI to complete testing processes and has been recognized in cybersecurity competitions. It is available on GitHub.

items.title: superlevels
items.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking!
items.summary: Superlevels is a safe, open-source Chrome extension, allowing users to review its code and customize it. It's safer than installing potentially harmful extensions. The project is maintained by levelsio on GitHub.

items.title: pi-computer-use
items.description: control your applications using pi-coding-agent. fully invisible.
items.summary: Pi-computer-use enables Pi agents to control applications on macOS through a semantic interface, utilizing Accessibility targets for full, invisible control. It integrates Anthropic's Computer Use API for screen, mouse, and click actions. This tool is ideal for advanced engineers seeking non-Anthropic model control.

items.title: hi-kid
items.description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. A desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.
items.summary: HiKid is a free, open-source desktop app for children to practice English. Built with React and TypeScript, it targets kids in non-English-speaking countries. It helps them improve their speaking and listening skills.

items.title: agent-style
items.description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.
items.summary: agent-style provides 21 rules to make AI agents write like tech pros. It applies to tools like Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider. Use it to enhance coding and writing outputs.

items.title: thClaws
items.description: Open-source agent harness platform. Native Rust, multi-provider, runs on your own machine. Sovereign by design.
items.summary: thClaws is a native Rust AI agent platform that runs locally on your machine, offering multi-provider capabilities and open standards. It is sovereign by design, ensuring full control over your data and operations.

items.title: wanman
items.description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.
items.summary: Wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It automates multi-agent workflows and task execution. It allows human observers to step back while local agents manage operations.

items.title: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
items.description: A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
items.summary: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform is a cross-platform Flutter app that runs offline AI models directly on Android, iOS, or PC without cloud services or filters, ensuring total privacy. It utilizes GGUF models for uncensored AI experiences.

items.title: alice
items.description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit
items.summary: ALICE is an AI-powered toolkit for YOLO dataset management, supporting image annotation, training, and automatic hardware detection. It uses GPU or CPU for AI inference based on configuration. Current version is 2.155.1.

items.title: stash
items.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.
items.summary: Stash is a self-hosted, persistent memory server for AI agents using Postgres, eliminating cloud dependency. It includes a MCP server and offers local control over AI agent context. It's a single binary solution.

items.title: im-not-ai
items.description: AI가 쓴 글이 아닌 것처럼 윤문해주는 스킬
items.summary: I'm an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. This project aims to transform AI-generated text into natural-sounding Korean without altering the content. It's a useful skill for making AI writing more relatable.

items.title: Hy3-preview
items.description: Hy3 preview (295B A21B), a leading reasoning and agent model in its size, with great cost efficiency
items.summary: Hy3 preview is a 295B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 21B active parameters, known for high efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Released by Tencent in 2026, it excels in reasoning and agent tasks. It's one of the most advanced models in its class.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory is a CLI tool that enhances Copilot's context retention, allowing it to recall past sessions and reduce context drift. It uses a local SQLite database for instant recall without needing a server or hooks. This tool helps AI coding agents maintain effective working memory across sessions.

items.title: kalshi-trading-bot
items.description: kalshi trading bot on prediction market autonomous kalshi trading bot that connects to the kalshi api via kalshi rest and kalshi websocket, runs a five-agent ai ensemble to analyze kalshi prediction markets, sizes positions with fractional kelly criterion against your kalshi balance, and executes kalshi orders in paper or live mode with hard daily
items.summary: The kalshi trading bot connects to Kalshi's API, uses a five-agent AI ensemble, and executes orders in paper or live mode with a daily limit. It optimizes positions using the fractional Kelly criterion against the user's balance.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2
items.description: Prompt as Code | GPT-Image2 工业级提示词引擎与模板库 - 329个案例逆向工程，13套工业级模板
items.summary: Awesome-GPT-Image-2 is an open-source project with 329 reverse-engineered templates for AI image prompts. It includes industrial-level templates and a prompt-as-code approach. The project has 101 stars on GitHub.

items.title: AITD
items.description: AI Trading Agent for Everyone
items.summary: AITD is a local AI trading agent that can run on any machine, allowing users to configure, test, and execute trades. It supports defining trading strategies and managing positions. The agent can analyze stock data for informed decisions.

items.title: Supervisor-Skills
items.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。
items.summary: Supervisor-Skills is an AI tool that distills a supervisor's decade of research experience into practical skills, aiding from idea generation to paper submission. It's based on the expertise of a leading AI researcher. Use it for efficient research guidance.

items.title: vllm-swift
items.description: vLLM Metal plugin powered by mlx-swift — high-performance LLM inference on Apple Silicon
items.summary: vLLM Metal plugin leverages MLX for high-performance LLM inference on Apple Silicon. It offers faster inference than PyTorch and supports vLLM's full API. It uses Apple Silicon's unified memory for efficient operations.

items.title: dspy-agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills + validated end-to-end examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI — fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM.
items.summary: DSPy 3.2.x agent skills include validated examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI, covering fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM. These skills are production-ready and tested end-to-end. Essential practices for prompt optimization using DSPy are available.

items.title: gpt_image_playground
items.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具
items.summary: The tool gpt_image_playground uses the gpt-image-2 API from OpenAI to generate and edit images. It can create various styles, from manga to realistic scenes. This tool is useful for creating visual content without extensive editing.

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools
items.summary: Reusable agent skills are executable code that AI agents can use to perform tasks. They can access file systems and run commands. Skills enhance agent capabilities for various tasks.

items.title: endless-toil
items.description: Hear your agent suffer through your code
items.summary: Endless Toil is a plugin that humorously plays groan sounds as AI coding agents process increasingly complex code. It supports macOS and Linux. It requires Python 3.10+.

items.title: ChatGpt-Image-Studio
items.summary: I'm an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I don't have specific details on "ChatGpt-Image-Studio." My purpose is to provide factual, concise responses.

items.title: AlphaBrain
items.description: The Comprehensive Toolkit for Embodied AI Models
items.summary: AlphaBrain is an open-source framework for embodied AI, integrating various learning algorithms and reinforcement paradigms. It supports scalable world models and has been applied in humanoid robots like AlphaBot2 for industrial tasks. AlphaBrain's unified approach enhances AI's understanding of complex environments.

items.title: ascent-research
items.description: research cli for agent
items.summary: Ascent-research is a CLI for AI agents, built in Rust, facilitating incremental research workflows. It integrates HTTP, browser, and local file operations. It's available on GitHub.

items.title: ai-application-roadmap
items.description: A bilingual map of AI engineering evolution, real-world AI usage patterns, and vibe coding best practices.
items.summary: AI engineering focuses on building production-ready systems using language models, emphasizing reliable system design, data privacy, and practical coding skills. The roadmap includes foundational programming, data analysis, and machine learning. Essential skills include system design and working with cloud infrastructure.

items.title: FL-Production-25.2.5-DAW
items.description: 25.2.5 Music Production DAW 2026 Beatmaking AI Mastering Stems Separation PluggnB Organic Sounds MIDI Support VST3 Plugins Audio Recording Low Latency Mixing Mastering Windows 11 Sound Design Virtual Instruments Producer Edition Professional Audio Resource
items.summary: This FL-Production-25.2.5 DAW offers beatmaking, mastering, and sound design tools for professional audio on Windows 11. It supports VST3 plugins, MIDI, and low-latency mixing. Ideal for music production and mastering.

items.title: Awesome-GPT-Image-2-OpenAi
items.description: The Definitive GPT Image 2 Prompt Vault — Master OpenAI's next-gen model with curated prompts for pixel-perfect text, consistent characters, and professional-grade assets. Optimized for creators and developers.
items.summary: GPT Image 2 is an advanced model by OpenAI, released in 2026, excelling in character consistency and text rendering. It supports up to 16 reference images and has 95%+ text accuracy. It features native Thinking Mode and web search during generation.

items.title: agent-simulator
items.description: An iOS simulator in a browser you can inspect
items.summary: Agent-Simulator is an open-source tool that allows iOS apps to be simulated and inspected in a browser. It provides a live preview and React Native inspector. It can interact with and control iOS apps directly from a web browser.

items.title: MultiWorld
items.description: Official Implementation of MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
items.summary: MultiWorld is a framework for scalable multi-agent, multi-view video world modeling, excelling in action controllability and consistency across different views. It uses Flow Matching with a Transformer backbone for efficient video generation. It outperforms existing models in video quality and scalability.

items.title: WindsurfPoolAPI
items.description: Multi-account pool proxy for Windsurf — 113+ models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Kimi) via OpenAI & Anthropic APIs, image upload, Cursor & Claude Code native / 企业级 Windsurf 多账号池化 API 代理
items.summary: WindsurfPoolAPI is a multi-account pool proxy for various AI models via APIs from providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It supports image uploads and integrates with Cursor & Claude Code. It's designed for enterprise-level use.

items.title: geo-citation-lab
items.description: A dataset and analysis pipeline for studying how AI search engines select and use citations.
items.summary: GEO optimizes content for citation in AI responses, focusing on structured data and clear hierarchies. It prioritizes answer-ready content and leverages co-citations. GEO aims to increase citation probability in AI-generated answers.

items.title: ai-videolab
items.description: Need images or videos that look good fast?   This makes it simple. Private, reliable, and used by millions.   Give it a try -https://tinyurl.com/imggenai
items.summary: AI-VideoLab offers fast, high-quality images and videos. It's private, reliable, and used by millions. Try it at https://tinyurl.com/imggenai.

items.title: mcp-cli
items.description: a prototype to save fork/exec overhead of ai code agent
items.summary: mcp-cli reduces token overhead by enabling dynamic tool discovery, cutting usage by up to 98% compared to static MCP. It dynamically invokes tools, avoiding large context dumps. This method is efficient for scaling AI agents.

items.title: Auto-2026-Desktop
items.description: Resource is a professional suite for advanced 2D/3D drafting. It features optimized toolsets, AI-assisted design, and high-performance libraries. Designed for engineers and architects, it ensures precision and seamless workflow integration for modern industrial projects in 2026.
items.summary: AutoCAD 2026 features AI-assisted design, specialized toolsets, and enhanced performance for engineers and architects. It automates repetitive tasks and integrates with Autodesk Docs for better collaboration. New web and mobile access options allow for drawing creation and editing on any device.

items.title: n8n-Actual-Automation
items.description: 6 n8n workflows for Actual Budget — AI transaction categorization, envelope auto-funding, and weekly budget briefing via Telegram
items.summary: n8n automates budget management with workflows for AI transaction categorization, auto-funding envelopes, and weekly budget briefings via Telegram. It uses AI to track expenses and updates Google Sheets. The platform is open-source and user-friendly.

items.title: skill-doctor
items.description: Local-first inspector for coding-agent skills, conflicts, precedence, and risk   analysis.
items.summary: The skill-doctor role involves planning, forecasting, and risk analysis. Conflicts arise from project cost overruns and additional service demands. Precedence and risk are managed through contract amendments and performance assessments.
